title: F&A Totem Recipe
description: Adds a recipe for the totem of undying which requires a Forbidden & Arcanus soul to work
body:
Adds a recipe for the minecraft totem of undying which requires a [Forbidden & Arcanus](https://modrinth.com/mod/forbidden-arcanus) soul, ghast tears, and gold blocks.

![soul recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/618ca4ec8452d3de97a4953fba1079a7dd491af2.png)
